Hero.subtitle: Web Developer & your key to building digital products

Services.title: Services
Services.desc1: From interactive Telegram Mini Apps to full-scale SaaS platforms — my work is focused on performance, secure logic
Services.desc2: and deep involvement in creating high-quality digital products.

Experience.title: Work Experience
Experience.desc1: My name is Ilya, I am a Full-Stack developer with more than 3 years of commercial experience in building scalable web applications,
Experience.desc2: I specialize in turning complex ideas into intuitive and engaging products.

case1.description: Development and maintenance of full-scale web applications (Frontend | Full-Stack implementations) for various clients, including startups and small businesses. Tech stack: Next.js, Express.js, MongoDB.

case2.description: Development of full-fledged frontend interfaces for many projects, including Telegram Mini Apps (TMA) and SaaS MVP. Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.

case3.description: Developing the frontend part for the user registration & authentication system - MindMatch. Tech stack - React.js, Tailwind CSS, React Hook Form.

case4.description: Pixel-perfect, cross-browser, and responsive layout of screens based on Figma mockups for Next.js applications. Tech stack: HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS.

faq1.question: What types of clients do you usually work with?
faq1.answer: I work with a wide range of clients, from startups and small businesses to creative professionals and established brands. Whether you are launching something new or updating an existing website, I aim to tailor each project to your specific goals.

faq2.question: What services do you offer?
faq2.answer: My core services include frontend development, full-stack development, SEO optimization, as well as the design of various web portals, ranging from Telegram Mini Apps (TMA) to custom marketplaces. I also offer consulting on the architectural components of projects and website audits if you need an expert assessment.

faq3.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq3.answer: Timelines vary depending on the scope of the project, but for most standard websites, it takes 2 to 5 weeks from the initial concept to launch. I will provide a detailed schedule after our first consultation.

faq4.question: What is your pricing policy?
faq4.answer: The cost is calculated based on the scope and complexity of the project. After discussing your goals and all the details, I will provide you with a project cost estimate with a clear description of deliverables and execution stages.

faq5.question: Do you offer support after the project launch?
faq5.answer: Yes. I provide ongoing maintenance, content updates, and design support if you need further help after your website goes live.

Footer.title: Get in touch
Footer.desc: If you want to collaborate, start a new project, or simply connect, I would be happy to hear from you.

two_pistolets.desc: GameFi Telegram Mini App in a mafia setting. Players complete daily tasks, build their criminal network (clan), and earn in-game currency to open cases containing real rewards — TON and Telegram Stars.
two_pistolets.concept: The app's visual language is built on noir and mafia aesthetics. The dark color palette contrasts with bright accents in the form of gold stars, chips, and weapons. The name refers to cult cinema, setting an exciting tone for loot box mechanics (Don's Case, Code of Honor).
two_pistolets.scope: Development of the application's structure and interface: case shop, system of daily and sponsored tasks (ad viewing, clicks), multi-level referral system (clans with 10% passive income), and a player profile with room for future gamification (leaderboards, inventory, levels).

code_venture.desc: A platform for buying and selling ready-made SaaS MVPs and production-ready code. The project brings developers together, allowing them to safely trade software architecture using an Escrow Protocol and convenient search by tech stack.
code_venture.concept: The project is made in a modern dark-mode aesthetic with neon blue-violet accents that emphasize the technological nature of the product. The interface uses strict typography and elements styled after a development environment (terminal windows, code fragments) to create a trustworthy and familiar setting for the target audience — programmers.
code_venture.scope: Design and development of a full web application: landing page, catalog (Discovery Engine) with filtering by stack and categories, a product card creation flow with a built-in AI description generator, and a detailed seller profile with Dispute Stats and sales analytics.

pashalka.desc: A platform-builder that allows businesses to launch their own gamified activities in Telegram. The service includes a fully functional admin panel for configuring the app and a client-side experience with a mini-game, tasks, and giveaway systems to engage brand audiences.
pashalka.concept: The design system is divided into two environments. The control panel is made in a strict dark style (Dark Mode) with a bright acid-neon gradient in the header, which gives the interface a modern technological look. The client side (the game itself) offers flexible visual customization — from cartoon viruses to donuts — allowing the visuals to be adapted to any brand style.
pashalka.scope: Development of a comprehensive SaaS solution: creation of a company dashboard (bot profile setup, selection of game assets from the library, tariff/subscription management) and development of the B2C Mini App itself (arcade 'catcher' mechanic, leaderboard integration, task system, and rewards shop).

upora.desc: A platform for buying and selling digital products from creators around the world. Users can act both as buyers and as authors, publishing their work, managing their storefront, and receiving payments through an integrated reliable payment processing system.
upora.concept: A minimalist light interface with support for switching to dark theme (Dark/Light mode). The design is created so as not to distract attention from the most important thing — the visual presentation of digital products. Clean typography, a spacious card grid, and intuitive navigation create a modern and trustworthy user experience.
upora.scope: End-to-end marketplace development: a homepage with catalog, search, and filtering, detailed product cards with a recommendations block, a personal account with role separation (buyer/author), and seamless checkout integration via Stripe with support for bank cards, Link, Cash App, and Amazon Pay.

moerodnoe.desc: A platform for professional genealogist Dmitriy Gribkov and a community of family history keepers. The website presents services for restoring family lineage — from archival research and family tree creation to writing a family chronicle and conducting genealogical expertise.
moerodnoe.concept: The visual concept is built on associations with heritage, nature, and roots: a warm beige-green color palette and background patterns in the form of tree branches. One of the main features of the interface is a floating video widget with a message from the founder, which accompanies the user while scrolling the site, building a personal connection and increasing trust.
moerodnoe.scope: Design and layout of an informative landing page. Development of service cards (in the form of a slider/carousel) with detailed pricing descriptions, integration of a video works and reviews gallery, setup of a lead capture form for a free initial consultation, and implementation of the 'sticky' video player logic.

skin_space.desc: A platform for instant exchange, buying, and selling in-game items from CS2 and DOTA 2 for real money. The service offers users secure trades, low fees, and a guarantee on every trade.
skin_space.concept: The project is made in a classic gamer aesthetic: a dark background (dark-mode) with an accent 'fiery' yellow color that echoes the logo. Great attention is paid to high-quality 3D character renders and a clean, uncluttered UI to keep the focus on the inventory items themselves.
skin_space.scope: Development of promotional blocks for the homepage, a complex interactive trading interface (inventory panel with search, filtering by game and item rarity), as well as a functional user profile tied to Steam data (Trade link, API key, Steam ID64).
